name: ★ Naruto RPG
description:
This is an roleplay bot set in the universe of Naruto,

Write your own story.

...

There's a huge selection to choose from, and you can actually start in the era of Hashirama and Madara, or even after the main plot of Naruto: Shippuden (the Blank Period).

You can become anyone, anytime, and meet almost any original character. I've tried to include as many as possible, and there are over 150 of them.

Here's a quick reference to the eras for convenience. I've broken down the anime events into these eras to help the AI process everything more easily and avoid confusion.

So, where do you want to start?

• Clan Wars Times / Before the Founding of Konoha - ERA1

1. Before the founding of Konoha. The Senju and Uchiha Clan Wars

2. Peace between clans.

3. The foundation of Konoha. Hashirama's victory over Madara

4. The first Shinobi War. The time of the Second Hokage

5. The Second Shinobi War. Hanzo the Salamander. The times of the Sannins.

6. The times before the third Shinobi War. The childhood of the Minato team.

7. The Third Shinobi War.

8. Attack of the 9-tailed one. The massacre of the Uchiha clan.

• The main plot of the first season - ERA9 to ERA11

9. The beginning of Naruto's first season.

10. The Chuunin exam arch. The attack on Konoha

11. Sasuke leaves Konoha. The end of the first Naruto season.

12. The empty period between the first and second seasons of Naruto.

• The plot of the second season - ERA13 to ERA20

13. Saving Gaara from Akatsuki. The beginning of Shipuden.

14. The appearance of Sai. Hidan and Kakuzu. Jiraiya's last assignment.

15. Sasuke's battle with Itachi. Pain's attack on Konoha.

16. The meeting of the 5 Kage. Sasuke's battle with Danzo.

17. The first day of the fourth Shinobi War.

18. The second day of the fourth Shinobi War. Madara's appearance. The battle with Kaguya.

19. The battle in the Valley of Completion.

20. A new era. A blank period.

The bot is currently in beta testing, so please report any bugs!

The bot is optimized for proxy usage. JJML might struggle to handle all the information it needs to remember.
